evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Maintain architectural standards, data quality, and operational excellence
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Emphasis on maintaining architectural standards and operational excellence foregrounds governance and quality practice over shipping speed, matching rigour.
evidence.domain_risk: strategic technical oversight across Revenue, Purchase, and Orders domains
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Oversight of Revenue, Purchase, and Orders domains affects core business decisions but carries no explicit regulatory or compliance consequence, matching moderate risk.
evidence.collaboration_width: Revenue domain; Purchase domain; Orders domain; analytics engineers (cohort being mentored)
evidence.data_team_maturity: Ability influencing technical direction across multiple teams
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: A lead role influencing technical direction across multiple established domains and mentoring other engineers indicates a large, specialized function, matching mature maturity.
evidence.jd_authorship: Identify cross-domain intersections and ensure consistent data modeling approaches
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: The JD names specific domains (Revenue, Purchase, Orders) and concrete responsibilities reflecting hiring-manager detail mixed with more generic leadership language elsewhere, matching mixed authorship.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: Develop reusable patterns and shared design standards; Drive improvements in data product quality, documentation, and observability
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: The focus on shared design standards and data product quality serves internal engineering and data consumers, matching internal_data orientation.
evidence.autonomy_level: Establish long-term technical direction for analytics engineering across specified domains
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: The verb 'establish long-term technical direction' explicitly signals setting strategy and priorities rather than executing scoped work, matching strategic autonomy.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Develop reusable patterns and shared design standards; Manage technical debt and enable sustainable evolution of data systems
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: The JD combines developing new reusable patterns with managing technical debt in existing systems, mixing new-build and fix/scale work, matching mixed.
evidence.work_arrangement: Hybrid arrangement with 2 recommended office days weekly
evidence.ai_role_explanation: Standard data architecture and technical leadership work; no signals of AI tool usage or AI-enabled infrastructure.
evidence.testing_framing: Maintain architectural standards, data quality... Drive improvements in data product quality, documentation, and observability
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Candidate owns quality practices through ownership verbs ('maintain', 'drive improvements') paired with quality/standards domains.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: Maintain... operational excellence... Manage technical debt and enable sustainable evolution
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Operational reliability framing (excellence, technical debt) present but without compliance or stakeholder-trust dominance.
